Chat Edit: 'Do not add any stub implementations, this isnt to be just the scaffolding but the entire addition! Please just make it in phases and lets start now finishing! Time isnt of an essense nor is complexity so please dont stub any imlementation or leave any out due to it being complex!

Verify the entire IDE to ensure all features are present and not just stubbed where they are needed to be fully implemented IE the call features the task bar views that dont open and close anything etc'
